zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Vernon於大約1446年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親John Lord of Haslington Vernon29歲，母親Mabel Gifford27歲。他和Lady Margaret Dutton至少有1個女兒。他去世於1497年7月13日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Vernon于大约1446年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲John Lord of Haslington Vernon29岁，母亲Mabel Gifford27岁。他和Lady Margaret Dutton至少有1个女儿。他去世于1497年7月13日在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Vernon was born about 1446, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lord of Haslington Vernon, was 29 and his mother, Mabel Gifford, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Lady Margaret Dutton. He died on 13 July 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Vernon est né environ 1446, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lord of Haslington Vernon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mabel Gifford, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lady Margaret Dutton. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Vernon um 1446 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lord of Haslington Vernon 29 und seine Mutter Mabel Gifford 27. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Dutton mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Juli 1497 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Vernon è nato il circa 1446 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Lord of Haslington Vernon, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Gifford, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Lady Margaret Dutton. Morì il 13 luglio 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Vernonが約1446年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Lord of Haslington Vernonは29歳，母Mabel Giffordは27歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Duttonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1497年7月13日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Vernon(이)가 대략 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lord of Haslington Vernon(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Gifford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Dutton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 7월 13일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1446, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lord of Haslington Vernon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Gifford, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Lady Margaret Dutton. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Vernon родился около 1446 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lord of Haslington Vernon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Gifford, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Lady Margaret Dutton. Он умер 13 июля 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Vernon nació aproximadamente 1446, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Lord of Haslington Vernon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mabel Gifford, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Lady Margaret Dutton. Murió el 13 de julio de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
